title: Apply for Individual Vehicle Approval (IVA): buses and coaches
body: "You must apply to get a bus or coach approved by the Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA) if it has been:   built rebuilt radically altered imported   How much it costs  The fee will depend on the test you need and the class of vehicle you want to approve.  You can pay online when you apply by:   credit or debit card using a pre-funded account     Check the IVA application fees for buses and coaches.   Apply for IVA for buses and coaches online  You’ll need:   the vehicle identification number (VIN) or chassis number the vehicle registration number (if registered) a clear scan or photo of any evidence that supports your application – for example a Certificate of Conformity (CoC)  your username and password if you’ve used the service before   You can register in the service if you’ve not used it before.  Once you’ve started your application you can save your form and complete it later.  Start now   What happens next  DVSA will send you an email to let you know the outcome. You’ll usually get a response within 10 working days.  Other ways to apply  The quickest way to apply is to apply online. You can apply by post if you cannot use the online service.  How to apply by post  Download and fill in the application form.             IVA application form: buses and coaches    PDF, 1.73 MB, 14 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email accessible-formats@dvsa-publishing.zendesk.com. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Read the  guidance on filling in the IVA application form  (PDF, 751 KB, 10 pages) before filling in the form.  Where to send the form  Send the application by post.   DVSAApprovals TeamThe EllipsePadley RoadSwansea SA1 8AN   Help with your application  Contact DVSA if you need help with your application.   enquiries@dvsa.gov.uk Telephone: 0300 200 1188 Monday to Friday, 7:30am to 6pm Find out about call charges   "
